CustomField.description: Specifies the Opportunity Contact Role automatically assigned to the Primary Contact on Opportunities belonging to individual Account types (Household, One-to-One, or Individual Accounts). Must match an existing Contact Role picklist value. Common values include "Donor" or "Decision Maker." See also Contact Role for Organizational Opps for non-individual Accounts.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Contact Role assigned to the Primary Contact on Opportunities for Household, One-to-One, or Individual Accounts.
CustomField.label: Contact Role for Individual Opps
